# Python language server (ty) test

# Start acme-lsp server
acme-lsp -headless -hidediag -server '\.py$:ty server' &

# ty does not support formatting (textDocument/formatting)

# Definition of "Greeter"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.py:'#131'
L -headless def -p
stdout 'hello.py:.*:class Greeter:'

# References to "Greeter"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.py:'#131'
L -headless refs
stdout 'hello.py:.*:class Greeter:'
stdout 'hello.py:.*:.*g = Greeter()'

# Type definition of "g"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.py:'#143'
L -headless type -p
stdout 'hello.py:1.7,1.14:class Greeter:'

# Signature of method "hello"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.py:'#150'
L -headless sig
stdout '\(\) -> Unknown'
stdout 'Hello prints a hello greeting'

# Hover over call to method "hello"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.py:'#146'
L -headless hov
stdout 'bound method Greeter.hello()'
stdout 'Hello prints a hello greeting'

# Completion in middle of method "hello"
#env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.py:'#146'
#L -headless comp
#stdout 'Greeter'

# Print all symbols in the file
L -headless syms
stdout 'Greeter'
stdout 'hello'
stdout 'main'
stdout '/hello.py:'

# Query workspace symbols
L -headless wss Greeter
stdout 'hello\.py:.*:class Greeter:'

# Rename Greeter to WorldGreeter
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.py:'#131'
L -headless rn WorldGreeter
cmp hello.py after-rename-py.txt


-- hello.py --
class Greeter:
    def hello(self):
        """Hello prints a hello greeting"""
        print("Hello, 世界")

def main():
    g = Greeter()
    g.hello()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
-- after-rename-py.txt --
class WorldGreeter:
    def hello(self):
        """Hello prints a hello greeting"""
        print("Hello, 世界")

def main():
    g = WorldGreeter()
    g.hello()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
